---
title: "glycoMusubi Shiny App Guide"
author: "Yusuke Matsui"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
site: bookdown::bookdown_site
documentclass: book
link-citations: yes
description: "User guide for the glycoMusubi interactive web application. Covers all seven modules, deployment options, and extension patterns."
---

# Preface {-}

[日本語版はこちら](../book-shiny-ja/_book/index.html){target="_blank"}

This book is the official user guide for the **glycoMusubi Shiny App**, an interactive web application for exploring the glycoMusubi knowledge graph, running glycan predictions, and analysing glycosylation enzyme expression.

## Who is this book for? {-}

- **Researchers** using the web interface to explore glycobiology data
- **Developers** deploying or extending the Shiny application
- **Bioinformaticians** integrating glycoMusubi into their workflows

## Book structure {-}

| Part | Chapters | Content |
|------|----------|---------|
| **Getting Started** | 1--2 | Installation, launch, and overview dashboard |
| **Modules** | 3--9 | Detailed guide for each of the seven modules |
| **Operations** | 10--11 | Deployment, Docker, and API extension |

## Quick start {-}

```bash
cd glycoMusubi/shiny_app
docker compose up -d
# Open http://localhost:3838
```
